items.text: The printing lab in Anderson Hall, Room 204, will be closed for equipment upgrades from March 16 through March 20. During this period, students may use the West Wing computer lab from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM. A $2 reload card is required for the temporary printers.

questions.stem: According to the notice, where can students print during the closure?

options.A: The Anderson Hall basement printing room
options.B: The West Wing computer lab on campus
options.D: The East Wing library reading area

questions.explanation: The notice directs students to the West Wing computer lab during the printing lab closure.

questions.stem: What must students obtain to use the temporary printers?

options.A: A $5 access pass from the student union
options.B: A signed permission slip from the dean
options.C: A $2 reload card for the printer system
options.D: A printed booking slip from the help desk

questions.explanation: The notice states a $2 reload card is required for the temporary printers.

items.text: Outdoor Film Series! Every Friday evening in May, join us at the Whitman Quad lawn at 8:30 PM. Bring a blanket and snacks; $3 popcorn will be sold at the entry table. The May 7 opening film is a campus favorite from last spring.

questions.stem: According to the flyer, what time do the films begin?

options.C: At 9:00 PM on the opening weekend
options.D: At 6:30 PM during the May weekends

questions.explanation: The flyer states the films begin at 8:30 PM on Friday evenings.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the May 7 opening film?

options.A: It is being shown in the series for the first time
options.B: It will charge a higher entry price than other nights
options.C: It has been popular with students in a previous semester
options.D: It requires advance registration through the events office

questions.explanation: The flyer describes the opening film as a campus favorite from last spring, implying prior popularity.
